code:
---
title: Layer Manager update Sequence
---

stateDiagram-v2
    state if_start <<choice>>
    [Logistics_Warehouse] --> if_start

    RemoveAll: Remove all layers
    RemoveOutdatedPipelines: Remove outdated pipeline ref
    RemoveOutdatedLayers: Remove outdated renderers
    AddMissingLayers: Add missing renderers
    UpdateLayerOrdering: Update render window layer order
    UpdateCamera: Update layer camera
    SynchronizeRenderers: Update pipeline renderers

    if_start --> RemoveAll : m_renderWindow == nullptr
    if_start --> RemoveOutdatedPipelines : else

    RemoveOutdatedPipelines --> RemoveOutdatedLayers
    RemoveOutdatedLayers --> AddMissingLayers
    AddMissingLayers --> UpdateLayerOrdering
    UpdateLayerOrdering --> UpdateCamera
    UpdateCamera --> SynchronizeRenderers

    RemoveAll --> [Logistics_Warehouse]
    SynchronizeRenderers --> [Logistics_DeliveryRoute]
repo_description: A 3D Slicer extension introducing a new displayable manager architecture for layered rendering and interaction handling.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要梳理一下Layer Manager的更新流程。核心是从Logistics_Warehouse出发，根据m_renderWindow的状态做分支判断。如果m_renderWindow是nullptr，直接走RemoveAll清理所有层；否则进入正常的更新管线。
明白了，所以if_start是一个choice节点。那正常更新管线的后续步骤呢？清理之后是重建还是直接更新？

正常分支先RemoveOutdatedPipelines移除过期管线引用，然后RemoveOutdatedLayers清理过期渲染器，接着AddMissingLayers补充缺失的渲染器，之后UpdateLayerOrdering更新渲染窗口的层序，UpdateCamera调整层相机，最后SynchronizeRenderers同步管线渲染器，流程结束到Logistics_DeliveryRoute。
好的，我先把主线画出来。从if_start分出两条边，nullptr条件指向RemoveAll，else指向RemoveOutdatedPipelines。正常管线的六个状态按顺序串联，RemoveAll清理完后回到Logistics_Warehouse。
主线是对的。不过确认一下，RemoveAll之后确实是回到Logistics_Warehouse而不是继续其他步骤吧？这是短路清理的场景。
确认，RemoveAll直接返回Logistics_Warehouse。另外SynchronizeRenderers的终点是Logistics_DeliveryRoute，这两个物流节点作为起止标记。
等等，状态名称的命名规范需要统一。RemoveOutdatedPipelines、RemoveOutdatedLayers、AddMissingLayers、UpdateLayerOrdering、UpdateCamera、SynchronizeRenderers都用驼峰命名，RemoveAll也是。
已调整，所有状态节点命名统一。最终流程：从Logistics_Warehouse进入choice判断，nullptr时RemoveAll后返回；正常流程经六个更新步骤后到达Logistics_DeliveryRoute。
